reference: Allergies may cause vertigo. Allergies are treated by avoiding allergens and using antihistamines like montelukast and levocetirizine in combination. At times, a short course of oral steroids may be necessary.
text: Allergies may cause vertigo. Allergies are treated by avoiding allergens and using antihistamines like Bontolu-Cast and other sterilizing anti-inflammation. At times, a short course of oral steroids may be necessary.
